name: First American Bank and Trust Company
description_short: First American Bank & Trust is a full-service community bank offering personal and business checking, savings, lending, mortgages, and wealth management services through digital and in-person channels.
description_long: First American Bank & Trust positions itself as a local, community-focused financial institution committed to personalized service and stable banking relationships. The bank has established itself as a traditional full-service bank with a strong emphasis on customer-centric values and local presence. The bank offers a comprehensive range of financial products across personal and business segments. For personal banking, they provide checking accounts, savings products, debit cards, and mobile banking through their FABTGo app. On the lending side, they offer personal loans, mortgages, and home financing solutions. Their business division includes business checking, business loans, treasury management services, and remote deposit capture. Additionally, they provide wealth management services including trust services and investment management. First American Bank & Trust distinguishes itself through its emphasis on personalized service, local decision-making, and accessibility. The bank markets itself as an institution where customers receive tailored products rather than one-size-fits-all solutions. They highlight digital convenience through their mobile app (FABTGo) which includes Zelle money transfer capabilities, mobile check deposit, debit card controls, and transfers. Their website emphasizes core convictions and relationship-based banking rather than transactional banking. As a regional community bank, First American Bank & Trust serves customers seeking traditional banking relationships with local accountability. However, the website provides limited specific information about fee structures, interest rates, account minimums, or competitive advantages beyond service philosophy. Prospective customers should directly contact the bank or visit their locations to understand specific product terms and compare rates with other institutions.
services: Mobile banking app (FABTGo) with Zelle integration
pros: Comprehensive service offerings including personal banking, business banking, lending, mortgages, and wealth management in one institution
Mobile banking app (FABTGo) with modern features including Zelle money transfers, mobile check deposit, and debit card controls
Dedicated business services including treasury management, remote deposit capture, and tailored business lending solutions
Trust and investment services for wealth planning and management
Local, community-focused bank with emphasis on personalized service and relationship banking
Bill pay capabilities with both consumer and business options
Multiple account login portals for different service lines (personal, business, trust & investment)
cons: Website provides minimal information about specific fee structures, interest rates, or account minimums for comparison
No prominent information about insurance products, credit cards, or broader financial services some customers may need
Limited geographic information on the site regarding branch locations (though ATM locator is available)
No mention of specific certifications, awards, or third-party ratings to validate service quality claims
Website lacks transparency on lending rates, approval criteria, or loan products comparison details
best_for: Small business owners seeking personalized lending and treasury management services
Homebuyers looking for mortgage services with local bank relationship and support
Customers who prefer local community banking with relationship managers over digital-only banks
Individuals with wealth management needs including trust services and investment planning
diagnosis: First American Bank & Trust is best for customers seeking a full-service community bank with personalized service, local decision-making, and integrated financial solutions across personal, business, and wealth management. The primary caveat is that the website lacks specific details about rates, fees, and product terms, requiring direct contact with the bank for comparison shopping and account qualification information.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: First American Bank & Trust is a full-service community bank offering checking, savings, lending, mortgages, and wealth management services.
fdic_official_name: First American Bank and Trust Company
